chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.41 of 2013 (City District Government Karachi and another v. Shaukat Ali) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.464/2013 10.5.2024 Mr. Syed Hassan M. Abidi, Advocate for Appellants Mr. K. A. Wahab, Advocate for Respondent ************* Both learned Counsel submit that they have settled their dispute amicably out of Court. Mr. K. A. Wahab submits that he is not pressing the claim of damages granted by the learned Single Judge in the sum of Rs.1 million. On this statement learned Counsel for the Appellant submits that if the Respondent is not pressing for the damages in pursuance of the decree, he would not press the Appeal. With this understanding the Appeal is disposed of along with all pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
